dashboard.title: Smart Document Registry
dashboard.subtitle: Automatic data extraction
dashboard.demo_alert: You are in DEMO mode. See how document analysis works!
dashboard.welcome_sub: Here's what's happening in your office today.

ai.nudge_msg: Hello! AI Agent here. 🤖 I see that {{name}} is missing some documents. Let's get this done!
ai.beach_msg: Hey, that's a beach photo, not an invoice! Please provide the correct document. 😉
ai.excel_toast: In the full version, AI extracts all details and saves them to Excel!
ai.beach_photo_msg: This is a beach photo, not an invoice! Please send the correct document. 😉

status.late_notice: Deadline passed! Please upload as soon as possible.

ocr.waiting_msg: Waiting for the first documents to analyze...
ocr.toast_rejected_msg: Document rejected. Client has been notified.

nudge_modal.body_unknown:
Hello,

The AI system analyzed the submitted file:
"{{fileName}}"

Unfortunately, it could not be recognized as an accounting document. Please re-submit the correct invoice or bank statement.

Deadline: {{deadline}}

Best regards,
Accounting Office

team.title: Office team
team.invite_toast: Employee invitation — available in full version

month_close.title: Close month
month_close.desc: Current documents ({{count}} clients) will be archived. The new month starts with empty categories.

demo.banner_full: Demo version — all data is fictional. Explore the full power of Brakomat.
demo.bottom_desc: We'll set it up for your accounting office — with your data and branding.
demo.bottom_btn: I want Brakomat for my office →

premium.section_desc: Features available after deployment for your accounting office
premium.client_portal_toast: Client portal — in the full version clients log in via their own dedicated link 🔗
premium.ksef_desc: Electronic invoices fetched automatically from the National e-Invoice System daily. Zero manual work.
premium.vies_desc: Every counterparty automatically verified in VIES and the MF VAT Whitelist — with bank account preview.
premium.portal_desc: Your clients log in to their own page and upload documents themselves. You just approve.
premium.cron_desc: The system automatically sends email/SMS/WhatsApp reminders according to your rules — no clicking needed.
premium.archive_desc: Full document history from every closed month. Fast search and download.
premium.team_desc: Add office employees, assign clients to them and track the progress of the entire team.

client_view.ready_desc: Click below to inform the office that you have finished uploading.
client_view.finish_success_msg: Sent! The office has been notified of your document readiness.

tooltips.drive: Open the dedicated cloud storage folder for this client to manage source documents.
tooltips.nudge: Send an automated Email/WhatsApp reminder to the client about missing documents. Reminders are pre-defined and fully automated – just press the button 😉
tooltips.lock: Approve and lock the month. Prevents further editing by the client, generates final reports, and prepares data for export to your accounting software.
tooltips.ocr_analyze: Run AI analysis to extract data from the document, verify VAT status, and check business registry consistency.
tooltips.ocr_smart_nudge: Smart AI Contact: The agent will automatically prepare and send a message to the client requesting improvements to this specific document 😉
tooltips.settings: Client configuration: manage the list of required documents, set individual deadlines, and define AI automation rules.
tooltips.client_view: Client zone preview: view the interface from your client's perspective, verify file upload progress, and notification status.
tooltips.export: Generate a summary spreadsheet (.xlsx) with all client statistics, document statuses, and OCR analysis data for reporting purposes.

welcome.title: Stop chasing clients
welcome.intro: Brakomat is a document management system for accounting offices — it automates everything that costs you time and stress.
welcome.security_note: In the full version, there is a secure login panel with separate access for you and your clients.
welcome.description: Demo version — all data is fictional. Click below to explore.
welcome.cta_button: I want this for my office

tooltips_stats.ready: Companies that provided all documents and have been approved.
tooltips_stats.missing: Companies with missing documents, but the deadline has not yet passed.
tooltips_stats.late: ALARM: Clients past your deadline (e.g., after the 5th). The system has automatically prepared AI nudges for them.
tooltips_stats.correction: OCR Errors: Blurry or cropped invoices end up here. The client will see error details and the option to re-upload.
